Unit 2

This is where you can find the projects that I worked on throughout Unit 2.

The first task that we worked on was creating a quiz using java script. We had to create a pop-up box quiz which opens in a new tab and asks you a series of questions. Below, you can find a link to that quiz. For the true or false quesitons, the OK box indicates true and the cancel box indicateds false.

My Quiz
